testcase.name: test_dashboard_render_no_crash
testcase.failure:
dummy_wrapper = <tx2.wrapper.Wrapper object at 0x169e6f380> clear_files_teardown = None
def test_dashboard_render_no_crash(dummy_wrapper, clear_files_teardown): tx2.utils.DISABLE_DEBOUNCE = True dash = Dashboard(dummy_wrapper) > dash.render()
tests/test_dashboard.py:13: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ tx2/dashboard.py:439: in render fig = visualization.plot_clusters_stacked( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
clusters = {'-1': [0, 1, 2, 3]} cluster_words_classified = {'-1': {'awesome': {'0': '0', '1': '2', 'total': '2'}, 'row': {'0': '2', '1': '2', 'total': '4'}, 'testing': {'0': '2', '1': '2', 'total': '4'}}} encodings = {'awesome': 0, 'not-awesome': 1} colors = ['#1f77b4', '#ff7f0e', '#2ca02c', '#d62728', '#9467bd', '#8c564b', ...]
def plot_clusters_stacked(clusters, cluster_words_classified, encodings, colors): """Plot highest word values for each cluster, colored according to entry classification""" num_cols = 4
num_rows = math.ceil(len(clusters) / num_cols)
> fig, axs = plt.subplots( ^^^ num_rows, num_cols, figsize=(10, num_rows * 2), squeeze=False ) E NameError: name 'plt' is not defined
tx2/visualization.py:504: NameError

testcase.name: test_plot_big_wordcloud_no_crash
test_plot_passed_wordcloud_no_crash
testcase.failure:
dummy_df = text target 0 testing row 0 0 1 testing row 1 0 2 testing row 2, awesome 1 3 testing row 3, awesome 1
def test_plot_passed_wordcloud_no_crash(dummy_df): cloud = gen_wordcloud(dummy_df.text) > plot_passed_wordcloud(cloud, "test")
tests/test_visualizations.py:88: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
cloud = <wordcloud.wordcloud.WordCloud object at 0x16d7e06e0>, name = 'test'
def plot_passed_wordcloud(cloud, name): """Render the given word cloud.
:param cloud: The word cloud to render. :param name: The title to render with the word cloud. """ > fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 5)) ^^^ E NameError: name 'plt' is not defined
tx2/visualization.py:129: NameError

testcase.name: test_plot_wordclouds_no_crash
testcase.failure:
dummy_df = text target 0 testing row 0 0 1 testing row 1 0 2 testing row 2, awesome 1 3 testing row 3, awesome 1 dummy_clusters = {'0': [0, 1], '1': [2, 3]}
def test_plot_wordclouds_no_crash(dummy_df, dummy_clusters): dashboard = type("Dashboard", (object,), {})() dashboard.transformer_wrapper = type("Wrapper", (object,), {})() dashboard.transformer_wrapper.clusters = dummy_clusters # forgive me for I have sinned...(I couldn't figure out how to do the equivalent with mocker)
prepare_wordclouds(dummy_clusters, dummy_df.text) > plot_wordclouds(dashboard)
tests/test_visualizations.py:98: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
dashboard = <tests.test_visualizations.Dashboard object at 0x16d7e0830>
def plot_wordclouds(dashboard): """Render the grid of all wordclouds.
:param dashboard: The current dashboard, needed in order to grab the cluster data. """ num_cols = 4 num_rows = max(math.ceil(len(dashboard.transformer_wrapper.clusters) / num_cols), 2) # NOTE: we set a minimum row count of 2, because otherwise axs below won't be a nested array.
> fig, axs = plt.subplots(num_rows, num_cols, figsize=(8, num_rows * 1.5)) ^^^ E NameError: name 'plt' is not defined
tx2/visualization.py:150: NameError

testcase.name: test_plot_embedding_projections_no_crash
testcase.failure:
mocker = dummy_wrapper = dummy_df = text target 0 testing row 0 0 1 testing row 1 0 2 testing row 2, awesome 1 3 testing row 3, awesome 1 def test_plot_embedding_projections_no_crash( mocker, # noqa: F811 -- mocker has to be passed in as fixture dummy_wrapper, dummy_df, ): tx2.utils.DISABLE_DEBOUNCE = True dash = Dashboard(dummy_wrapper) > plot_embedding_projections(dummy_df.text.iloc[0], dash) tests/test_visualizations.py:110: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ tx2/utils.py:103: in debounced timer.start() tx2/utils.py:77: in start self._callback() tx2/utils.py:98: in call_it fn(*args, **kwargs) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ text = 'testing row 0' dashboard = , prediction = None @utils.debounce(1.0) def plot_embedding_projections(text, dashboard, prediction=None): dashboard.html_graph_status.value = ( "

" + tx2.visualization.get_nice_html_label("Graphing...", "#FF0000") + "

" ) > fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8)) ^^^ E NameError: name 'plt' is not defined tx2/visualization.py:284: NameError

testcase.name: test_plot_confusion_matrix_no_crash
testcase.failure:
dummy_df = text target 0 testing row 0 0 1 testing row 1 0 2 testing row 2, awesome 1 3 testing row 3, awesome 1 dummy_encodings = {'awesome': 0, 'not-awesome': 1}
def test_plot_confusion_matrix_no_crash(dummy_df, dummy_encodings): > plot_confusion_matrix(dummy_df.target, dummy_df.target, dummy_encodings)
tests/test_visualizations.py:142: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
pred_y = 0 0 1 0 2 1 3 1 Name: target, dtype: int64 target_y = 0 0 1 0 2 1 3 1 Name: target, dtype: int64 encodings = {'awesome': 0, 'not-awesome': 1}, figsize = (8, 8)
def plot_confusion_matrix( pred_y: List[int], target_y: List[int], encodings: Dict[str, int], figsize=(8, 8) ): """Get the confusion matrix for given predictions.
:param pred_y: Predicted labels. :param target_y: Actual labels. :param encodings: Dictionary of string label -> numeric label. :param figsize: the size with which to """ labels = [] encoded = [] for i in range(len(encodings.keys())): for key, value in encodings.items(): if value == i: labels.append(key) encoded.append(value) break cm = confusion_matrix(target_y, pred_y, labels=list(encodings.values()))
acc = np.trace(cm) / float(np.sum(cm)) miss = 1 - acc
> fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize) ^^^ E NameError: name 'plt' is not defined
tx2/visualization.py:238: NameError
